allow: Bash(npx expo install expo-router react-native-safe-area-context react-native-screens react-native-gesture-handler expo-constants expo-linking expo-status-bar 2>&1)
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "feat: add expo-router with root layout and index screen")
Bash(git add tailwind.config.js global.css metro.config.js babel.config.js app/_layout.tsx app/index.tsx package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "feat: configure nativewind v4 with tailwind")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); const nw = pkg.dependencies.nativewind; const tw = pkg.devDependencies.tailwindcss; console.log\('nativewind:', nw\); console.log\('tailwindcss:', tw\);")
Bash(git add types/index.ts store/app.ts app/index.tsx package.json package-lock.json)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add zustand store with app state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add app/_layout.tsx app/index.tsx services/api.ts hooks/useExample.ts package.json package-lock.json && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add tanstack query with queryClient provider and example hook

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add components/.gitkeep constants/theme.ts store/auth.ts && git commit -m "chore: add constants/theme, auth store placeholder, components dir")
Bash(git add app/\\\(tabs\\\)/_layout.tsx app/\\\(tabs\\\)/home.tsx app/\\\(tabs\\\)/profile.tsx app/index.tsx && git commit -m "feat: add tabs navigation with home and profile screens")
Bash(git -C /home/aloxxx/Workspace/YDB add tsconfig.json index.ts eslint.config.js package.json package-lock.json)

Bash(git -C /home/aloxxx/Workspace/YDB commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore: final bootstrap — all features verified

- Fix tsconfig.json: add nativewind/types augmentation and explicit includes to resolve className TypeScript errors on React Native components
- Remove stale index.ts referencing non-existent ./App \(project uses expo-router entry\)
- Add eslint.config.js generated by expo lint with eslint-config-expo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(npx eslint app/ store/ types/ services/ hooks/ constants/ 2>&1; echo "EXIT_CODE: $?")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('/home/aloxxx/Workspace/YDB/package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({zustand: pkg.dependencies.zustand, tanstack: pkg.dependencies['@tanstack/react-query'], nativewind: pkg.dependencies.nativewind, tailwindcss: pkg.devDependencies.tailwindcss, 'expo-router': pkg.dependencies['expo-router'], expo: pkg.dependencies.expo}, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(npx expo lint -- --ext .ts,.tsx app/ store/ services/ hooks/ types/ constants/ 2>&1)
Bash(npx eslint app/ store/ services/ hooks/ types/ constants/ 2>&1 || true)

Bash(ls /home/aloxxx/Workspace/YDB/app.json && cat /home/aloxxx/Workspace/YDB/app.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('splash key:', 'splash' in d.get\('expo',{}\)\); print\('scheme:', d.get\('expo',{}\).get\('scheme'\)\); print\('newArchEnabled:', d.get\('expo',{}\).get\('newArchEnabled'\)\)")
